outcomes: Identify and construct primary and secondary diatonic triads and their inversions on a grand staff
Apply standard four-part voice leading principles (SATB) to eliminate parallel fifths and octaves in harmonic progressions

sub_strands.sub_strand: Binary, Ternary, and Sonata Form Architectural Layouts
outcomes: Analyze classical and African art music compositions to determine structural sectional boundaries and modulation pathways
Compose original thematic motifs and develop them using rhythmic variation, inversion, and retrograde techniques

sub_strands.sub_strand: Dramatic Structure, Textual Critique, and Blocking
outcomes: Deconstruct a standard play script to chart the exposition, rising action, climax, falling action, and denouement
Formulate comprehensive scene blocking diagrams and direct cast positioning utilizing spatial theater zones

sub_strands.sub_strand: Screenplay Formatting, Storyboarding, and Camera Mechanics
outcomes: Draft a short, single-scene film script conforming strictly to standard industry screenplay layout software rules
Generate a detailed operational storyboard specifying camera angles, shot sizes (extreme close-up to wide shot), and motion vectors
